# Checklist ✅

- [ ] Merged latest `main` and resolved conflicts
- [ ] Edited the card source (`cheatsheet.html`), not the generated `index.html`
- [ ] Regenerated `index.html` with `./scripts/build-web.sh` and committed it
- [ ] Regenerated the PDF with `./scripts/pdf.sh` and eyeballed the A4 output
- [ ] Verified every link with `./scripts/check-links.sh`
- [ ] "Verified against" version line is current (Bee 2.8.x · bee-js 12.x · swarm-cli 3.x)
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant (README / CLAUDE.md / docs/PLAN.md)
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] PR title follows the repo's convention
